content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help!
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了感谢并自然结束对话
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'welcome', 'enjoy', 'safe travels' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you helping me find the museum!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我找到博物馆！
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! Hope you love the exhibits!
Happy to help! Have a fantastic time exploring!
Anytime! Don't forget to take lots of photos!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确回应了具体帮助并表达祝福
语言准确性：动词搭配和时态是否正确（如 'happy to help'）
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的口语表达（如 'don't forget to...'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'help', 'enjoy', 'explore', 'fantastic' 等场景词汇

content.speakerText: Thank you for everything—you made my trip unforgettable!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你做的一切，你让我的旅行难以忘怀！
expectedAnswers: That means so much to me! Wishing you safe travels home!
I'm so glad I could help! Take care and come back soon!
You're very welcome! I hope you keep wonderful memories!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了强烈感谢并给予情感回馈
语言准确性：是否使用了高级表达（如 'means so much', 'wishing you'）
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、温暖，符合情感交流场景
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'unforgettable', 'safe travels', 'memories', 'come back' 等情感关键词
